ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Generalized Linear Model, Linear Discriminant Analysis) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Primary evaluation metric for the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "roc" REAL /* Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) score */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) score */,
  "sensitivity_train" REAL /* Sensitivity score on the training dataset */,
  "specificity_train" REAL /* Specificity score on the training dataset */,
  "sensitivity_test" REAL /* Sensitivity score on the testing dataset */,
  "specificity_test" REAL /* Specificity score on the testing dataset */,
  "evaluation_metric_value" REAL /* Value of the primary evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, ongoing, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the evaluation */,
  "evaluated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design of the experiment (e.g., A/B testing, regression analysis) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "experiment_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-model link */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "model_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the model used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_datasets" (
  "experiment_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-dataset link */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "dataset_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
